description: Merchant organisation ID
Persistent browser identity stored in localStorage — survives sessions. Used as lookup key for prior_session_count enrichment — not encoded directly as a feature
Per-tab session identity stored in sessionStorage — new on each tab/reload
Unique flush identifier — {session_id}_{flushCounter}_{timestamp}
Whether the device supports touch — 1 or 0
IANA timezone from browser Intl API
Viewport width normalised to 2560px — value between 0 and 1
Viewport height normalised to 1440px — value between 0 and 1
Whether session originated from a paid channel — 1 or 0
Traffic source platform — meta / google / direct / klaviyo etc.
Normalised traffic channel — paid_social / paid_search / organic_social / email / direct etc.
Window devicePixelRatio — typically 1 / 1.5 / 2 / 3
Ad click ID parameter found in URL — fbclid / gclid / ttclid / none etc.
Milliseconds from page load to first user interaction (scroll / click / touch / keydown) — null if user never interacted (bounce)
Unix timestamp in milliseconds when edge worker received the flush
Hostname extracted from Origin or Referer header
Number of prior sessions for this client_id looked up from Redis (key: metricade_client_sessions:{org_id}:{client_id}) — 0 on first visit injected by edge worker before publishing to stream
True if ip_meta.ip_timezone differs from browser_timezone
Connecting IP address
ISO 2-letter country code from Cloudflare cf object
Autonomous system number
ASN organisation name
Connection type classified by ASN — residential / datacenter / unknown
Timezone derived from IP geolocation
Parsed browser name from User-Agent
Parsed browser version
Parsed operating system name
Parsed operating system version
Classified device type — desktop / mobile / tablet / bot / unknown
Parsed device manufacturer
True if request came from an in-app browser — Instagram / TikTok / Facebook etc.
Sine encoding of hour of day — sin(2π × hour / 24)
Cosine encoding of hour of day — cos(2π × hour / 24)
Sine encoding of day of week — sin(2π × dow / 7)
Cosine encoding of day of week — cos(2π × dow / 7)
Local hour at time of ingest (0–23)
1 if Saturday or Sunday — 0 otherwise
Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the event was recorded in the browser
UUID identifying the current page navigation — refreshed on each SPA route change
Sequential page navigation counter within the session — starts at 1
Type of event — page_view / route_change / scroll / touch_end / click / tab_hidden / tab_visible / engagement_tick / idle
Milliseconds since the previous event was pushed to the buffer
Present and true only when this event was re-queued after a failed flush — used to identify retried payloads
FNV-1a 32-bit hash of location.pathname as 8-char hex string
Full URL including query string at time of page load
FNV-1a 32-bit hash of new pathname after SPA navigation
Full URL after SPA navigation
Scroll speed in pixels per second — positive is down negative is up
Rate of change of velocity in px/s² — positive speeding up negative slowing down
Direction of scroll — 1 down / -1 up / 0 none
1 if scroll direction flipped from previous event — 0 otherwise
Percentage of page scrolled — 0 at top 100 at bottom
Milliseconds since last scroll stop before this scroll started — 0 if continuous
Normalised horizontal scroll position — always 0 for vertical-only scroll
Normalised vertical position on page — scrollY / scrollHeight between 0 and 1
Milliseconds since the previous touch_end event — 0 on first touch
Milliseconds finger was held down from touchstart to touchend
Horizontal touch contact radius in pixels from Touch.radiusX
Vertical touch contact radius in pixels from Touch.radiusY
Touch force from Touch.force — 0 to 1 — most Android devices return 0
1 if touch radius is less than 2px — indicates accidental or ghost tap
Normalised horizontal position of touch centre — clientX / viewportWidth
Normalised vertical position of touch centre — clientY / viewportHeight
Milliseconds since the previous click event — 0 on first click
Normalised horizontal position of click — clientX / viewportWidth
Normalised vertical position of click — clientY / viewportHeight
1 if click target is not an interactive element — A / button / input / label etc.
Milliseconds the tab spent hidden before becoming visible again
Milliseconds since last user activity at time of tick — always less than 5000
Milliseconds since last user activity when idle threshold was crossed — always >= 5000
